# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Dependency Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop, 'feature/**']
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'

jobs:
  setup-and-cache:
    name: Setup Dependencies & Cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      node-cache-hit: ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      pip-cache-hit: ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      config-cache-hit: ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: node-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock', 'pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: pip-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements*.txt', 'Pipfile.lock', 'poetry.lock', 'setup.py', 'setup.cfg', 'pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache environment-specific config files
        id: config-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.ci
            config/
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .flake8
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
          key: config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('.env.ci', 'config/**', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', 'babel.config*', 'jest.config*', '.flake8', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg', 'mypy.ini') }}
          restore-keys: |
            config-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        id: build-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
            __pycache__/
            *.egg-info/
          key: build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            build-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci --ignore-scripts
            npm rebuild
          elif [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
            npm install -g pnpm
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv .venv
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install -e ".[dev]" 2>/dev/null || pip install -e . 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Generate environment-specific config
        if: steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ ! -f ".env.ci" ]; then
            cat > .env.ci << 'ENVEOF'
          NODE_ENV=test
          CI=true
          LOG_LEVEL=warn
          DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db
          CACHE_ENABLED=true
          ENVEOF
            echo "Generated .env.ci for CI environment"
          fi
          mkdir -p config
          if [ ! -f "config/ci.json" ]; then
            cat > config/ci.json << 'CONFIGEOF'
          {
            "environment": "ci",
            "debug": false,
            "logging": {
              "level": "warn",
              "format": "json"
            },
            "cache": {
              "enabled": true,
              "ttl": 3600
            },
            "security": {
              "strict_mode": true
            }
          }
          CONFIGEOF
            echo "Generated config/ci.json"
          fi

  lint:
    name: Lint & Static Analysis
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock', 'pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements*.txt', 'Pipfile.lock', 'poetry.lock', 'setup.py', 'setup.cfg', 'pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.ci
            config/
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .flake8
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
          key: config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('.env.ci', 'config/**', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', 'babel.config*', 'jest.config*', '.flake8', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg', 'mypy.ini') }}
          restore-keys: |
            config-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Run Node.js linting
        if: hashFiles('package.json') != ''
        run: |
          if [ -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npx eslint . --max-warnings 0 2>/dev/null || echo "ESLint not configured, skipping"
            npx prettier --check . 2>/dev/null || echo "Prettier not configured, skipping"
          fi

      - name: Run Python linting
        run: |
          if [ -d ".venv" ]; then
            source .venv/bin/activate
            python -m flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics 2>/dev/null || echo "Flake8 not installed, skipping"
            python -m pylint --fail-under=7.0 **/*.py 2>/dev/null || echo "Pylint not installed or no Python files, skipping"
            python -m bandit -r . -ll 2>/dev/null || echo "Bandit not installed, skipping security scan"
          fi

      - name: Security audit - Node.js
        if: hashFiles('package-lock.json') != ''
        continue-on-error: true
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Security audit - Python
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          if [ -d ".venv" ]; then
            source .venv/bin/activate
            pip-audit 2>/dev/null || echo "pip-audit not installed, skipping"
            safety check 2>/dev/null || echo "safety not installed, skipping"
          fi

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock', 'pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements*.txt', 'Pipfile.lock', 'poetry.lock', 'setup.py', 'setup.cfg', 'pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.ci
            config/
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .flake8
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
          key: config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('.env.ci', 'config/**', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', 'babel.config*', 'jest.config*', '.flake8', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg', 'mypy.ini') }}
          restore-keys: |
            config-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Load CI environment config
        run: |
          if [ -f ".env.ci" ]; then
            echo "Loading .env.ci configuration"
            set -a
            source .env.ci
            set +a
          fi

      - name: Run Node.js tests
        if: hashFiles('package.json') != ''
        run: |
          if [ -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npx jest --ci --coverage --passWithNoTests 2>/dev/null || \
            npm test 2>/dev/null || \
            echo "No Node.js test runner configured, skipping"
          fi

      - name: Run Python tests
        run: |
          if [ -d ".venv" ]; then
            source .venv/bin/activate
            python -m pytest --tb=short --cov --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term-missing -q 2>/dev/null || \
            python -m unittest discover -s tests -v 2>/dev/null || \
            echo "No Python tests found, skipping"
          fi

      - name: Upload test coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-reports
          path: |
            coverage/
            htmlcov/
            coverage.xml
            .coverage
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  build:
    name: Build
    needs: [lint, test]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock', 'pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements*.txt', 'Pipfile.lock', 'poetry.lock', 'setup.py', 'setup.cfg', 'pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.ci
            config/
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .flake8
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
          key: config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('.env.ci', 'config/**', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', 'babel.config*', 'jest.config*', '.flake8', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg', 'mypy.ini') }}
          restore-keys: |
            config-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore build cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
            __pycache__/
            *.egg-info/
          key: build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            build-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Build Node.js project
        if: hashFiles('package.json') != ''
        run: |
          if [ -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo "No build script configured for Node.js"
          fi

      - name: Build Python project
        run: |
          if [ -d ".venv" ]; then
            source .venv/bin/activate
            if [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
              python -m build 2>/dev/null || echo "Python build module not available, skipping"
            fi
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Print cache summary
        run: |
          echo "=== Cache Summary ==="
          echo "Node modules cached: ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.node-cache-hit == 'true' && 'HIT' || 'MISS (freshly installed)' }}"
          echo "Pip packages cached: ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.pip-cache-hit == 'true' && 'HIT' || 'MISS (freshly installed)' }}"
          echo "Config files cached: ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.config-cache-hit == 'true' && 'HIT' || 'MISS (freshly generated)' }}"
          echo "===================="
